CREATE TABLE json_test (id INT, json_col JSON);
SELECT json_get(json_col, 'key') FROM json_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT json_get(json_col, 'nested.subkey') FROM json_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT j1.id, json_get(j2.json_col, 'key') FROM json_test j1 JOIN json_test j2 ON j1.id = j2.id WHERE j1.id = 1;
SELECT json_get(json_col, 'key') AS value, json_get(json_col, 'nested.subkey') AS subvalue FROM json_test WHERE json_get(json_col, 'key') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE json_parent (parent_id INT, json_col JSON);
SELECT json_get(json_col, 'children[0].key') FROM json_parent WHERE parent_id = 1;
SELECT json_get(json_col, 'children[1].key') FROM json_parent WHERE parent_id = 1;
SELECT json_get(jp.json_col, 'children') AS children FROM json_parent jp JOIN json_test jt ON json_get(jt.json_col, 'key') = 'value1' WHERE jp.parent_id = 1;
